title: festuca arundinacea subsp. interrupta
intro: Festuca arundinacea subsp. interrupta, also known as tall fescue or giant fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Festuca arundinacea subsp. interrupta include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive problems, and supporting respiratory health. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Festuca arundinacea subsp. interrupta are made by infusing the grass in hot water or using it as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
